definition: Ability to detect feedback interpret signals and revise assumptions
measurement_note: Monitoring after-action reviews pilot programs scenario planning and feedback loops

definition: Ability to shift rules strategies budgets resource flows and operations
measurement_note: Legal room budget discretion operational flexibility and adaptive pathways

definition: Variety of ecological social institutional technical and knowledge options
measurement_note: Biodiversity livelihood diversity institutional diversity and technical diversity

definition: Ability to coordinate act revise rules remain accountable and maintain legitimacy
measurement_note: Cross-scale coordination participation enforcement funding and public trust

definition: Spare capacity reserves backup pathways staffing buffers and time
measurement_note: Emergency funds inventory staffing redundancy and ecological buffers

definition: Confidence cooperation and acceptance of difficult adaptation decisions
measurement_note: Transparency accountability participation and history of institutional performance

definition: Lock-in path dependence procedural inflexibility and inability to revise
measurement_note: Outdated standards legal barriers cultural lock-in and political denial

definition: Degree to which disturbance pressure reaches essential functions
measurement_note: Hazard intensity climate pressure social vulnerability and ecological stress
